title: Special methods should return NotImplemented instead of raising NotImplementedError
description: Avoid raising NotImplementedError from special methods, as it is less informative than returning NotImplemented.
message: Special methods should return NotImplemented instead of raising NotImplementedError.
recommendation: Return NotImplemented instead of raising NotImplementedError.
why_is_this_an_issue: Returning NotImplemented instead of raising NotImplementedError improves code clarity and allows for more flexible exception handling.
how_to_fix: Replace raises NotImplementedError with return NotImplemented.

metadata.title: Special methods should return NotImplemented instead of raising NotImplementedError
